## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 5, 2026 - Jul 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Pimnr47_, Jul 7, 2026, 1/5: "The all has a scrolling glitch where the answer keeps repeating and keeps scrolling the text over the screen so that i cannot read it. It is unusable this way. I looked for help online but can only find AI slop answers. The irony. I tried all suggestions to fix this and it won’t work. Fix this issue please."
            2. _Dbinq_, Jul 5, 2026, 3/5: "This app is riddled with bugs. It creates these “special copy text boxes” that don’t even work. sometimes you ask it something, you can tell it’s trying to reply because the haptic feedback kicks in, but the actual text never appears. Features disappear, new ones break, and basic functions fail randomly. It does feel like overall it has gone backwards when it comes to how helpful it is."
            3. _alexjo48_, Jul 7, 2026, 5/5: "Copilot has helped fix a number of issues in my first week of use, from IT issues to TV problems. Excellent tool."
